_comment: Copy to auth.json and fill in tokens. NEVER commit auth.json to version control.
_instructions: Each private repo requires a GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT). Set the PAT value in the corresponding environment variable listed below. Scopes required: 'repo' for full private repo access.

Agentic-Pi-Harness.description: Private repo for Pi harness platform code

Pi.description: Private repo for Pi infrastructure and system scripts

MissionControl.description: Private repo for multi-agent orchestration platform

_setup_instructions.1_generate_tokens: Go to https://github.com/settings/tokens and create Personal Access Tokens with 'repo' scope
_setup_instructions.2_set_env_vars: Export the tokens as environment variables: export GITHUB_PAT_PRIVATE=ghp_xxx... && export GITHUB_PAT_MISSION=ghp_yyy...
_setup_instructions.4_fill_tokens: Edit auth.json and set token values from environment variables (optional; env var lookup preferred)
_setup_instructions.5_protect: Add auth.json to .gitignore — never commit this file
_setup_instructions.6_test: Run sync with: npm run sync:repos -- --test
